no_config_hint: No config found, click "Initialize Config" button
model_select_hint: Please select a time range to query model analysis data
checkin_enable_hint: When disabled, users will not be able to check in
checkin_base_reward_hint: Base computing power users get for daily check-in
checkin_streak_hint: Example: 3 days streak bonus 5 power, 7 days streak bonus 15 power
impl_usage_hint_priority_desc: Control which provider to use by modifying the "Sort" value. Lower sort value = higher priority. The system automatically uses the provider with the lowest sort value (shown with "In Use" label).
impl_usage_hint_power_desc: You can modify the computing power value for each provider.
impl_usage_hint_power_warn: Please modify carefully, incorrect power config may cause financial loss!
binary_deps_title: This version requires the following binary tools
binary_deps_hint: Please download and place them in the corresponding directory before upgrading.
binary_missing_desc: The following tools are missing. Some features may not work properly. Please download and place them in the specified directory.
modal_adjust_amount_hint: Positive to add, negative to deduct
modal_adjust_reason_placeholder: Please enter the reason for adjustment
config_sensitive_hint: Note: Sensitive config history will be masked
quick_config_empty_title: Please select a provider from the left to configure
quick_config_empty_hint: Or click "Quick Select" to auto-select recommended providers
config_complete_desc: Next, we recommend viewing the user manual to quickly learn about system features and operations.
impl_display_name_hint: Display name is managed by system, API aggregator sites read from config
impl_sort_order_hint: Used for sorting in list, smaller number comes first
impl_default_power_hint: Default power value defined in code
impl_power_value_hint: Once set, it overrides the default power value and takes effect immediately
impl_duration_billing_hint: This provider supports duration-based billing, you can configure power for different durations
impl_fixed_power_hint: This provider uses fixed power, no need to select duration
category_llm_desc: Select one or more LLM providers
category_image_desc: Select one or more image generation providers
category_video_desc: Select one or more video generation providers
toast_no_admin_permission: You do not have admin permission
toast_welcome_admin: 🎉 Welcome! You are the first admin. Please complete the quick config first
toast_query_monthly_failed: Failed to query monthly active users
toast_fill_reason: Please enter the reason for adjustment
toast_commercial_only_modify: This config requires commercial edition to modify. Please contact admin to upgrade.
toast_commercial_only_use: This config requires commercial edition. Please contact admin to upgrade.
toast_aggregator_site2_only: ai.comfly.chat is only allowed in aggregator site 2
toast_invalid_sort_value: Please enter a valid sort value
toast_invalid_power_value: Please enter a valid power value
confirm_approve_login: Are you sure you want to approve this user's login?
confirm_user_action: Are you sure you want to {{action}} this user?
confirm_action: Are you sure you want to {{action}}?
confirm_zjt_token_action: Are you sure you want to {{action}} this user's ZJT Token?
confirm_adjust_zjt_expire: Are you sure you want to adjust ZJT Token expiry?
confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to logout?
confirm_init_config: Are you sure you want to initialize config? This will import default configs from file to database (only add new, not overwrite existing)
confirm_impl_action: Are you sure you want to {{action}} provider "{{name}}"?
confirm_restore_power:
Are you sure you want to restore "{{name}}"'s power to default value {{power}}?
This will delete the current database config.
confirm_restore_duration_power:
Are you sure you want to restore "{{name}}"'s {{duration}}s power to default value {{power}}?
This will delete the current database config.
confirm_jiekou_tip:
💡 Tip:

jiekou requires Google or GitHub account to register, but you get $1 credit on signup!

Click "OK" to go to registration page
